scripts.env:copy-prod: node scripts/wsl-proxy.mjs pnpm exec tsx scripts/copy-gh-environment.ts --from staging --to production
scripts.cf:list-access-apps: node scripts/wsl-proxy.mjs pnpm exec tsx scripts/cf-list-access-apps.ts
scripts.push-secrets: node scripts/wsl-proxy.mjs pnpm exec tsx scripts/push-secrets.ts
scripts.destroy-legacy-data: node scripts/wsl-proxy.mjs pnpm exec tsx scripts/destroy-legacy-data-stores.ts
scripts.optional:bitwarden-to-secrets: node scripts/wsl-proxy.mjs pnpm exec tsx scripts/optional/bitwarden-to-secrets.ts
scripts.prepare: node scripts/wsl-proxy.mjs sh -c "command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 && pnpm exec lefthook install || exit 0"
